series_metadata.series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
